name: story-engine
description: YouTube story channel 9-wave automated pipeline (yadam / dark-history / bespoke). Engagement (curiosity + expectation = 몰입도) is the all-wave evaluation anchor. /story-rewrite skill enables existing-draft improvement with engagement-gap diagnosis and partial wave re-run.

PROJECT.description: AutoFlowCut work folder (parent of project folders). If omitted, MUST be resolved at runtime via mcp__autoflowcut__app_list_projects (the '작업폴더:' line). NEVER fall back to cwd or the source repo — that creates episodes inside the source tree.

changelog.2.2.0: 9-wave pipeline (W7 split into image-production + assembly; new W9 upload). Bespoke 3rd genre (universal + reference-driven meta-prompts). Engagement principle elevated to all-wave anchor. /story-rewrite skill added.
changelog.2.1.0: Fix: PROJECT_DIR must resolve from AutoFlowCut MCP work folder, never cwd/source repo. Reference docs must use installed $SKILL_DIR path, not source repo path.
